task_completion.description: Agent opened OrientDB Studio in a web browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html showing the OrientDB Studio login screen or main interface.
The OrientDB Studio interface indicates that 'demodb' is the currently active database (typically visible in the top header or sidebar).

task_completion.description: Agent located the 'Hotels' class within the database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Hotels' class is selected in the Schema tab, showing its properties, OR a query referencing the 'Hotels' class is visible in the Browse/Console tab.

task_completion.description: Agent configured the index with the correct name, property, and type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An index creation GUI form shows the name 'Hotels.Name', property 'Name', and type 'NOTUNIQUE', OR an equivalent SQL command (e.g., CREATE INDEX Hotels.Name ON Hotels (Name) NOTUNIQUE) is typed in the Studio console.

task_completion.description: The NOTUNIQUE index on the Hotels.Name property was successfully created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification is displayed in OrientDB Studio, OR the index 'Hotels.Name' of type 'NOTUNIQUE' is visible in the list of indexes for the 'Hotels' class.

integrity.description: The agent used the OrientDB Studio web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Actions are performed within the web browser at the specified localhost URL, rather than using terminal commands (like the OrientDB console script) or external database tools.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the database UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show progressive interaction with the OrientDB Studio UI (clicking tabs, filling forms, or running queries), not just pasting the final answer into a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The database 'demodb' contains 15 real-world hotels (e.g., Hotel Artemide, The Plaza Hotel). The task requires creating an index named 'Hotels.Name' of type 'NOTUNIQUE' on the 'Name' property of the 'Hotels' class using OrientDB Studio at http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html with credentials root:GymAnything123!.
